task: Verify failing /apply loan application test suites align with Stage 1 contracts

execution.reason: No shell execution tool available in the current runtime and node_modules/dependencies are not installed. The project has no source/stub files under src/app/api/apply or src/app/apply/_components, so the test imports would fail regardless.

summary.expected_failure_mode: Import/module resolution failure and route/function-not-implemented failure
blockers: Runtime shell access unavailable; `npm run test:apply` could not be invoked
node_modules not present; Vitest and testing-library are not installed
Architect stubs for route handlers and WizardShell are missing, so imports cannot resolve

alignment_findings.detail: Test imports routes that do not exist in api-contract.yaml: POST /api/apply/state, /api/apply/otp/send, /api/apply/otp/verify, /api/apply/documents/upload-url, /api/apply/perfios/*, /api/apply/offers. Contract routes are /apply/initialize, /apply/ekyc/send-otp, /apply/ekyc/verify, /apply/pan/verify, /apply/gstin/verify, /apply/gstin/fetch-returns, /apply/bank-statement/analyze, /apply/documents/upload (multipart), /apply/submit, /apply/consent.

Tests use step IDs loan_intent, personal_contact, aadhaar_verification, gst_verification, bank_statements. Contract ApplicationStep enum requires: basic_details, ekyc_consent, ekyc_verification, pan_consent, pan_verification, gstin_consent, gstin_verification, gstin_returns, bank_statement_consent, bank_statement_analysis, itr_upload, tds_upload, review_submit, submission_result.
Document upload tests send JSON with base64_content. Contract specifies multipart/form-data with file binary and requires application/pdf.

OTP tests send channel/destination/purpose. Contract /apply/ekyc/send-otp requires application_id, aadhaar_number and a ConsentReceipt; /apply/ekyc/verify requires application_id, otp_reference_id, otp.
Wizard step IDs and the WizardShell API are driven by the older step naming convention (loan_intent, personal_contact, etc.) and do not match the contract ApplicationStep enum.

Validation functions cover loan_amount, tenure_months, purpose, referral_code, full_name, mobile, email, business_pin_code, aadhaar, aadhaar_otp, pan, gstin. Loan amount, purpose, referral-code, mobile, email, aadhaar, aadhaar_otp, pan, gstin are consistent with contract patterns. tenure_months and business_pin_code are not defined in the active API contract.
Mutation tests include x-navdhan-requested-with header but do not include Idempotency-Key, which is required by the contract for all POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints.
GET /api/apply/offers is not present in api-contract.yaml.

recommendations: Install dependencies (`npm install`) and run `npm run test:apply` once shell access is available
Regenerate or update apply-api.test.ts to import from the exact contract routes and assert contract request/response shapes
Update apply-wizard.test.tsx to use contract ApplicationStep enum values
Add Idempotency-Key header to all mutation tests
Provide architect stubs under src/app/api/apply/* and src/app/apply/_components so imports resolve in the RED phase
